channel.title: Scripture Study & Come Follow Me
channel.itunes:author: Eric Wilde
channel.itunes:summary: Personal scripture-study podcast feed for Dr. Eric Wilde. Deep dives into Come Follow Me readings (Old Testament 2026), temple worship, sacred history, and the long chain of witnesses across ancient and modern revelation. Produced privately for personal use; not affiliated with any church or institution.
channel.description: Personal scripture-study podcast feed for Dr. Eric Wilde. Come Follow Me deep dives, temple worship, and the long chain of witnesses across ancient and modern revelation.

item.title: Bonus — Ancient Temple Worship & the Prayer Circle
item.description: A research-grounded exploration of ancient temple worship, the sacred prayer circle, and how the practice survived and was restored in the latter days. Includes ANE temple parallels, Qumran texts, and early Christian liturgical evidence.
item.itunes:summary: A research-grounded exploration of ancient temple worship, the sacred prayer circle, and how the practice survived and was restored in the latter days. Includes ANE temple parallels, Qumran texts, and early Christian liturgical evidence.
item.itunes:subtitle: Special Topics
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP01 — Exodus 14: The Sea Parts
item.description: Deep dive into Israel's deliverance at the Red Sea. Egyptian historical context, the pillar of cloud and fire, the doctrine of standing still, and the typology of baptism in Christ.
item.itunes:summary: Deep dive into Israel's deliverance at the Red Sea. Egyptian historical context, the pillar of cloud and fire, the doctrine of standing still, and the typology of baptism in Christ.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP02 — Exodus 15: The Song of Deliverance
item.description: The Song of Moses and Miriam — Israel's first hymn of deliverance. Hebrew poetry, ancient Near Eastern parallels, and the prophetic foreshadowing of the Lamb in Revelation 15.
item.itunes:summary: The Song of Moses and Miriam — Israel's first hymn of deliverance. Hebrew poetry, ancient Near Eastern parallels, and the prophetic foreshadowing of the Lamb in Revelation 15.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP03 — Exodus 16: Bread from Heaven
item.description: Manna in the wilderness. The daily-bread theology of dependence, the Sabbath revealed before Sinai, and the bread-of-life christology that runs from Exodus to John 6.
item.itunes:summary: Manna in the wilderness. The daily-bread theology of dependence, the Sabbath revealed before Sinai, and the bread-of-life christology that runs from Exodus to John 6.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP04 — Exodus 17–18: Water, War, and Wisdom
item.description: Water from the rock at Massah and Meribah, the battle with Amalek and Aaron and Hur holding up Moses' hands, and Jethro's counsel on shared leadership — the foundations of priesthood organization.
item.itunes:summary: Water from the rock at Massah and Meribah, the battle with Amalek and Aaron and Hur holding up Moses' hands, and Jethro's counsel on shared leadership — the foundations of priesthood organization.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP05 — Exodus 19–20: Sinai and the Ten Commandments
item.description: Israel arrives at Sinai. The Lord's offer of a kingdom of priests, theophany on the mountain, and the Decalogue read in light of restoration scripture and ancient Near Eastern covenant forms.
item.itunes:summary: Israel arrives at Sinai. The Lord's offer of a kingdom of priests, theophany on the mountain, and the Decalogue read in light of restoration scripture and ancient Near Eastern covenant forms.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP06 — Exodus 24: The Covenant Ratified
item.description: The covenant ratification ceremony — blood at the altar, the elders ascending, eating and drinking before God on the mountain. The Old Testament prefigure of sacrament and temple.
item.itunes:summary: The covenant ratification ceremony — blood at the altar, the elders ascending, eating and drinking before God on the mountain. The Old Testament prefigure of sacrament and temple.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP07 — Exodus 31–32: The Golden Calf Apostasy
item.description: Israel's collapse into idolatry while Moses is on the mount. Aaron's failure of leadership, Moses' intercession, and the prophetic pattern of apostasy and restoration.
item.itunes:summary: Israel's collapse into idolatry while Moses is on the mount. Aaron's failure of leadership, Moses' intercession, and the prophetic pattern of apostasy and restoration.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP08 — Exodus 33–34: Face to Face with the Glory of God
item.description: Moses speaks with the Lord face to face as a man speaks with his friend. The cleft of the rock, the proclamation of the divine name, and the renewed tablets — the climax of the Sinai narrative.
item.itunes:summary: Moses speaks with the Lord face to face as a man speaks with his friend. The cleft of the rock, the proclamation of the divine name, and the renewed tablets — the climax of the Sinai narrative.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Exodus EP09 — Exodus 35–40: The Tabernacle of Moses (Deep Dive)
item.description: A 3.5-hour deep dive into the wilderness Tabernacle. The materials and craftsmen, the structure and furnishings, the Aaronic priesthood and the five sacrifices, Yom Kippur and the two goats, and the climactic descent of the glory of the Lord in Exodus 40. Cross-referenced with the Ante-Nicene Fathers, Josephus, modern General Conference teaching, and the Restoration's witness on temples.
item.itunes:summary: A 3.5-hour deep dive into the wilderness Tabernacle. The materials and craftsmen, the structure and furnishings, the Aaronic priesthood and the five sacrifices, Yom Kippur and the two goats, and the climactic descent of the glory of the Lord in Exodus 40.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Exodus (Deep Dive)
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: CFM Leviticus 19 — Ye Shall Be Holy (Supplemental)
item.description: A focused 40-minute supplemental episode on Leviticus 19 — the holiness chapter at the literary heart of the Torah. The Holiness Code framing, "Ye shall be holy: for I the Lord your God am holy," Christ's Second Great Commandment in Leviticus 19:18, the practical holiness of gleanings, honest wages, justice for the deaf and blind, love for the stranger, and what it all means for Latter-day Saint discipleship today.
item.itunes:summary: A focused 40-minute supplemental episode on Leviticus 19 — "Ye shall be holy: for I the Lord your God am holy." The Holiness Code, the Second Great Commandment, and the practical holiness of gleanings, honest wages, and love for the stranger. Rounds out this week's Come Follow Me reading.
item.itunes:subtitle: Come Follow Me — Leviticus (Supplemental)
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: Sacred Markings EP01 — Holiness to the LORD: The Vestments of Aaron
item.description: The high priest's robe in Exodus 28 — ephod, breastplate, Urim and Thummim, the golden plate. What the embroidered marks meant and how they shaped every later sacred garment tradition.
item.itunes:summary: The high priest's robe in Exodus 28 — ephod, breastplate, Urim and Thummim, the golden plate. What the embroidered marks meant and how they shaped every later sacred garment tradition.
item.itunes:subtitle: Sacred Markings on Ancient Religious Clothing
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: Sacred Markings EP02 — Nations Clothed in Thread: ANE, Qumran, and the Christian Seal
item.description: Comparative survey across ancient Near Eastern, Qumran, Jewish, and early Christian sources. Tassels, fringes, sacred dyes, and the Christian sphragis — the seal placed on the body at baptism.
item.itunes:summary: Comparative survey across ancient Near Eastern, Qumran, Jewish, and early Christian sources. Tassels, fringes, sacred dyes, and the Christian sphragis — the seal placed on the body at baptism.
item.itunes:subtitle: Sacred Markings on Ancient Religious Clothing
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: Sacred Markings EP03 — The Robe of Glory Restored: Christ to the Temple Today
item.description: From the Hymn of the Pearl to the modern temple — how the robe-of-glory motif runs from early Christianity through the restoration. Concludes with Janet Ewell's 2026 Interpreter Foundation paper on gamma marks.
item.itunes:summary: From the Hymn of the Pearl to the modern temple — how the robe-of-glory motif runs from early Christianity through the restoration. Concludes with Janet Ewell's 2026 Interpreter Foundation paper on gamma marks.
item.itunes:subtitle: Sacred Markings on Ancient Religious Clothing
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: Sacred Markings Complete — Full Deep Dive Plus Interpreter Foundation Bonus
item.description: All three Sacred Markings episodes concatenated into a single 3-hour deep dive, followed by a bonus segment integrating Janet Ewell's April 17, 2026 Interpreter Foundation paper, 'Gamma Marks: Recent Works Relevant to Their Study.'
item.itunes:summary: All three Sacred Markings episodes concatenated into a single 3-hour deep dive, followed by a bonus segment integrating Janet Ewell's April 17, 2026 Interpreter Foundation paper, 'Gamma Marks: Recent Works Relevant to Their Study.'
item.itunes:subtitle: Sacred Markings on Ancient Religious Clothing
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde

item.title: Guest — Toby's Exodus 19–34 Podcast
item.description: A guest podcast on Exodus 19–34 produced by Toby. Shared with Eric for personal listening.
item.itunes:summary: A guest podcast on Exodus 19–34 produced by Toby. Shared with Eric for personal listening.
item.itunes:subtitle: Guest Episodes
item.itunes:author: Eric Wilde
